policy.sourceHandling: Use Xiaohongshu references for observation only. Do not publish copied images in the web app.
policy.confirmationGate: New inspiration remains pending until the owner confirms it should change generation rules.

creators.name: 柏恩花室
creators.notes: Natural floral arrangements with tropical greenery, wind-shaped branches, and small bright color accents.

creators.name: 早春的树EarlySpring
creators.notes: Natural bouquet structures, airy branches, hand-tied shapes, and blind-box flower combinations.

creators.name: Césped
creators.notes: Light, atmospheric arrangements with soft color fields and small-scale floral rhythm.

creators.name: 大兜花园DorBeetleGarden
creators.notes: Garden-like wildness, starry small flowers, and loose natural edges.

creators.name: Dreamseeker寻梦
creators.notes: Dreamlike bouquet styling with misty points, light color transitions, and spatial softness.

entries.title: Initial DailyFlora aesthetic anchor
colorNotes: Dark stage backgrounds make pale flowers and star points glow.
Green, lemon yellow, violet, moon white, coral, and sky blue can rotate as daily themes.
spatialNotes: Bouquets should be volumetric, with stems radiating from a lower grip into a rounded but irregular crown.
Back and side views need real branches, small flowers, and leaf clusters instead of a flat billboard.
materialNotes: Use many small blooms, berries, twig tips, grasses, and floating pollen-like dots.
parameterSuggestions: Favor medium and small flower instances.
Use outer halo lines and point particles for starry edges.
Keep a hand-tied floating base instead of a vase for v1.
